subcodes.first_line: O spiritual companion! May God increase thy vitality through the divine fragrances. Verily, the breaths of the Holy Spirit have been diffused [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الرفیق الروحانی زادک الله انتعاشا بنفحات الله قد انتشرت نفحات روح القدس
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @The Holy Spirit
